title: WiFi troubleshooting
content: If a device disconnects from WiFi, first confirm signal strength, then reboot the router, and finally re-run device network setup.

title: Battery troubleshooting
content: If battery drains too quickly, check firmware version, reduce reporting frequency, and inspect temperature conditions.

title: Gateway setup help
content: If gateway setup fails at step 3, perform a factory reset and verify that the activation code was entered correctly.

title: Firmware update help
content: If firmware update stalls, keep the device powered, wait 10 minutes, then retry from the admin dashboard.

title: Calibration basics
content: Calibration instructions can be found in the setup guide. Recalibrate after major environmental changes.

title: Dashboard interpretation
content: If live data appears missing, confirm the device is reporting successfully and verify dashboard time filters.
